purpose: Operator checklist for validating local Report Workflow review packet evidence before any training discussion.
required_inputs: report-quality-review-packet-*.json files downloaded from the Report Workflow UI
server preview artifact embedded as preview_artifact

required_commands.name: validate_single_packet
pass_criteria: PASS report quality review packet validated

required_commands.name: build_evidence_pipeline
pass_criteria: Report quality review packet evidence pipeline: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_evidence_pipeline
pass_criteria: PASS report quality review packet evidence validated

required_commands.name: validate_extracted_artifact_jsonl
pass_criteria: PASS report quality correction artifact JSONL validated

required_commands.name: create_handoff_index
pass_criteria: Report quality review packet handoff: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_handoff_manifest
pass_criteria: PASS report quality review packet handoff validated

required_commands.name: create_pending_signoff
pass_criteria: Report quality review packet pending signoff: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_reviewer_signoff
pass_criteria: PASS report quality review packet signoff validated

required_commands.name: summarize_signoffs
pass_criteria: Report quality review packet signoff summary: PASS

required_commands.name: create_training_readiness
pass_criteria: Report quality review packet training readiness: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_readiness
pass_criteria: PASS report quality review packet training readiness validated

required_commands.name: create_training_discussion_handoff
pass_criteria: Report quality training discussion handoff: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_discussion_handoff
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training discussion handoff validated

required_commands.name: create_pending_training_discussion_decision
pass_criteria: Report quality training discussion pending decision: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_discussion_decision
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training discussion decision validated

required_commands.name: create_training_experiment_plan_draft
pass_criteria: Report quality training experiment plan draft: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_experiment_plan_draft
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training experiment plan draft validated

required_commands.name: create_pending_training_experiment_plan_review
pass_criteria: Report quality training experiment plan pending review: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_experiment_plan_review
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training experiment plan review validated

required_commands.name: create_training_final_approval_packet
pass_criteria: Report quality training final approval packet: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_final_approval_packet
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training final approval packet validated

required_commands.name: create_pending_training_final_approval_packet_review
pass_criteria: Report quality training final approval packet pending review: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_final_approval_packet_review
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training final approval packet review validated

required_commands.name: create_training_final_approval_record_template
pass_criteria: Report quality training final approval record template: PASS

required_commands.name: validate_training_final_approval_record_template
pass_criteria: PASS report quality training final approval record template validated

stop_gate: evidence pipeline validation failed
correction artifact JSONL validation failed
ready_artifacts is below the required minimum
reviewer or reviewed_at is missing
required scans are not pass
any no-side-effect boundary flag is true
training readiness validation failed
training discussion handoff has missing files
training discussion handoff validation failed
training discussion decision is incomplete
training discussion decision authorizes training, upload, provider job, or model promotion
training experiment plan draft validation failed
training experiment plan draft contains started execution steps
training experiment plan review is incomplete
training experiment plan review authorizes training, upload, provider job, or model promotion
training final approval packet validation failed
training final approval packet records final approval or authorizes execution
training final approval packet review is incomplete
training final approval packet review records final approval or authorizes execution
training final approval record template validation failed
training final approval record template records approval or authorizes execution
